stale_review_pattern.note: Two moderate/minor curmudgeon holes were false positives — patches had already landed before the review ran. This suggests the curmudgeon sometimes runs against a state that lags the decider's most recent commit. The universal-pusher workspace-sync should reduce this lag, but if stale-review false positives persist (>2/week), tinker should investigate the curmudgeon clone freshness gap.
